subject: Urgent: Wire Needed for Confidential Acquisition
body:
Hi,

I need you to process a confidential wire transfer today in connection with a time-sensitive acquisition. The board has approved the initial deposit, and this must be completed before 3:00 PM to avoid penalties.

Please wire $248,750 to the following account immediately:
Bank: First Harbor Trust
Routing: 021-48392
Account: 7784501293

This transaction is strictly confidential. Do not discuss with anyone else until I confirm receipt.
notes: CEO impersonation requesting urgent confidential acquisition wire.

subject: Updated Banking Details for March Invoices
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please note that we have transitioned to a new banking partner due to an internal restructuring. All outstanding and future payments must be directed to the updated account below.

Bank: Summit Valley Bank
Routing: 021-57284
Account: 5567829014

Kindly confirm once the March invoice totaling $18,940 has been processed using these new details.
notes: Vendor bank detail update using lookalike domain.

subject: Immediate Funds Transfer Required
body:
I’m in meetings all day and can’t be reached by phone. Please prioritize this wire.

Send $92,300 to:
Bank: MetroLine Commercial
Routing: 021-66411
Account: 8843201976

This relates to a settlement agreement that must close today. Email me once completed.

Dear Finance Team,

Account: 9912038475

body:

Due to a payroll system upgrade, my direct deposit information has changed. Please update my salary deposit account before the next cycle.

Account: 6728401935

This is under strict NDA. Handle discreetly and confirm once funds are sent.
notes: Law firm impersonation requesting escrow wire.

body:

Our records show Invoice 8841 for $12,880 remains unpaid. To avoid late fees, please remit immediately to the account listed below.

Bank: BlueRidge Commercial

notes: Vendor impersonation with late fee pressure.

subject: Vendor Portal Banking Update Required

Hello,

We have updated our vendor portal with new remittance details following a banking consolidation. Please disregard prior instructions.

Bank: Northern Axis Bank

Account: 5612098734

subject: Board-Approved Transfer – Execute Today

Send $610,000 to:
Bank: Horizon Trust Bank
Routing: 021-87412
Account: 9981234507

Reply with confirmation and transaction reference.
notes: Executive authority with market close urgency.

body:

Bank: Pacific Crest Bank
Routing: 021-22903
Account: 7312098456

Transfer $129,880 to:
Bank: Granite Hill Bank
Routing: 021-88341
